---
name: Documentation rules
description: Guidance for README, docs, and agent metadata files.
applyTo: "README.md,AGENTS.md,CONTRIBUTING.md,CHANGELOG.md,docs/**/*.md,.github/**/*.md"
---
# Documentation rules

- Use grounded, explicit language for fork architecture and product boundaries.
- Keep docs aligned with the fork-only repo structure.
- Distinguish product-owned, adapter-managed, and unsupported or external surfaces.
- Name concrete `src/vs/...` patch zones when docs describe fork implementation.
